name: OpenAI Attributes Trace

llmSpans.name: create

input.content: Tell me a fun fact about space. Be brief.

llmSpans.output: A fun fact about space is that a day on Venus is longer than a year on Venus! It takes about 243 Earth days to rotate once on its axis, but only about 225 Earth days to orbit the Sun.

input: Tell me a fun fact about space. Be brief.
output: A fun fact about space is that a day on Venus is longer than a year on Venus! It takes about 243 Earth days to rotate once on its axis, but only about 225 Earth days to orbit the Sun.
